title: OverKnights
description: A recipe compat mod between Overgeared and Knights & Heraldry
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef0b4316d7ad6384f78660b749819cc0a71e324d.png)
## A commissioned mod made to bridge between Overgeared and Knights & Heraldry

**Required mods:**
*   Overgeared
*   Knights & Heraldry

This mod was made as a commission, and only add **armors** recipe, weapon recipes aren't added.

**New items:**
- Leather Patch
- Leather Strip
- Woolen Patch
- Chainmail Mesh
- Tassets
- Single Slit Visor
- Dual Slit Visor
- Grill Visor

**Special thanks to:**
- lwkysad: Commissioner
- condottiere1453: Helping me with the recipes
